expected_tools.name: find_species_by_threat_and_habitat
expected_tools.cypher: MATCH (s:Species)-[:THREATENED_BY]->(t:Threat) MATCH (s)-[:LIVES_IN]->(h:Habitat) WHERE toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower($threat_keyword)   AND toLower(h.name) CONTAINS toLower($habitat_keyword) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS species

items.question: Which Endangered species are threatened by climate change?
gold_contexts: Blue whale is Endangered and threatened by Climate change.
Galápagos sea lion is Endangered and threatened by Climate change and El Niño altering ocean currents and fish prey abundance.

Green turtle is Least concern (Globally as of 2025, though some regional populations remain Vulnerable/Endangered) and threatened by Climate change (altering sand temperatures affecting hatchling sex).
Irrawaddy dolphin is Endangered and threatened by Climate change.
Monarch butterfly is Endangered and threatened by Climate change.
Penguin is Varies by species (Emperor penguin now Endangered as of April 2026) and threatened by Climate change (loss of sea ice).

expected_tools.name: find_species_by_threat_and_status
expected_tools.cypher: MATCH (s:Species)-[:THREATENED_BY]->(t:Threat) WHERE toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower($threat_keyword)   AND toLower(s.status) CONTAINS toLower($status) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS species

expected_tools.name: get_conservation_actions_for_threat
expected_tools.cypher: MATCH (s:Species)-[:THREATENED_BY]->(t:Threat) MATCH (s)-[:PROTECTED_BY]->(a:ConservationAction) WHERE toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower($threat_keyword) RETURN DISTINCT a.name AS action
